primary_reference.citation: Truckses et al. 1996, staphylococcal nuclease H124L stabilization.

note: Report effect.direction (stabilizing) as a literature-calibrated direction and use submitted short comparative MD metrics (local RMSF/SASA around residue 124, secondary-structure persistence, packing) as consistency evidence. Do not claim that short MD alone proves the experimental delta-delta-G.
